source.placeLookup: Google Places API exact brand/store matches
source.webSearch: BrightData MCP search/scrape plus Cursor WebSearch, Spanish-first research pass; requested additions rechecked 2026-06-30
source.provinceScan: Google Places API (New) nearby+text search across AMBA and major Buenos Aires province cities, 2026-07-12

validation.includedScope: Buenos Aires (CABA) curated brand showrooms plus dedicated furniture stores in Buenos Aires province with ≥100 Google Maps reviews and ≥3.8 rating, OPERATIONAL status, open ≥5 days/week, and furniture_store primary type; plus manually researched online/showroom additions that sell a broader furniture range and meet their noted chair-stock, public-pricing and domestic-shipping thresholds; physical stores limited to the Greater Buenos Aires / La Plata / Luján metro area.

excludedBrands.name: Cuero Buenos Aires
excludedBrands.reason: No exact operational Google Maps store match found; searches returned unrelated leather/clothing businesses.

excludedBrands.name: Carcione (Hector Carcione e Hijo)
excludedBrands.reason: Google Maps lists an operational restoration/caning shop, but the source notes classify it as restoration rather than a browsable furniture brand showroom.

excludedBrands.name: English Styles
excludedBrands.reason: Google Maps lists the Parana 1185 showroom as temporarily closed.

excludedBrands.name: Gris Dimension
excludedBrands.reason: Multi-brand importer showroom for B&B Italia, Flexform and Maxalto rather than a single independent brand.

excludedBrands.name: Kalpakian Casa
excludedBrands.reason: Multi-brand design hub with rotating third-party designer spaces, not a monobrand store.

excludedBrands.name: Andy Forn Casa
excludedBrands.reason: Showroom is inside the Rue des Artisans multi-brand gallery at Distrito Arenales.

excludedBrands.name: K&M Casa
excludedBrands.reason: Showroom is inside the Rue des Artisans multi-brand gallery at Distrito Arenales.

excludedBrands.name: Ana Menaz
excludedBrands.reason: Official site lists a Martinez location, but Google Places did not return an exact operational Ana Menaz place there; the Palermo place is permanently closed.

excludedBrands.name: Besform
excludedBrands.reason: Search results describe a showroom, but Google Places resolved the brand to Spain rather than Buenos Aires.

excludedBrands.name: Picardi
excludedBrands.reason: Official site lists an Avenida Belgrano showroom, but Google Places searches did not return an exact operational Picardi place.

excludedBrands.name: Morph
excludedBrands.reason: Primarily a home-goods/decor chain rather than a furniture-focused brand showroom.

excludedBrands.name: Tidelli Argentina
excludedBrands.reason: Operational Palermo place found, but no official website-backed Buenos Aires store page or review history was found during this pass.

excludedBrands.name: MITE
excludedBrands.reason: Checked by user request on 2026-06-30; official chair category and product pages showed priced chairs, but the checked chair cards/pages were marked Sin stock.

validation.filteredOut: Shopping malls, unrelated furniture stores, generic leather shops, warehouses, low-confidence social-only listings, non-BA matches, and duplicate/non-showroom manufacturer listings were removed from the public list.
validation.chairPriceSource: Rechecked 2026-06-30 using BrightData Google search, BrightData scrapes of official brand/category pages, and regular web search cross-checks. Medians use current public online chair selling/list prices, divide explicit multi-chair sets by unit count, and exclude transfer/cash-only discounts, financing installment amounts, zero-price placeholders, combo sets and out-of-stock cards. Brands without public chair prices remain null with updated notes; Sajo was added under a user-specific 3+ in-stock chair-unit threshold; Geben Argentina, Denver Concept, Muebledón and Decorando Shop were added under a user-specific 1+ in-stock priced-chair threshold. Chair-only brands were removed from the public list. Re-sampled 2026-07-12 with BrightData for previously unsampled brands; brands without public dining-chair list prices were removed.

provinceInclusion.scope: Provincia de Buenos Aires (postal Bxxxx; CABA postal Cxxxx excluded)
provinceInclusion.excluded: Mattress/sommier specialists, hardware/herrajes, upholstery-supply shops, big-box home centers, thrift/clothing primary, and other non-dedicated furniture names

geoWindow.description: Greater Buenos Aires / La Plata / Luján metro window; excludes Junín and farther province cities (Mar del Plata, Bahía Blanca, Tandil, etc.)

chairPrice.note: Added 2026-06-30 by user request with a lower threshold: official Sajo chair category shows Silla Ñandu Comedor Bar Estilo Moderno at $26.599 with add-to-cart controls and 'Solo quedan 4 en stock.'
